title: helianthemum oelandicum var. lanceolatum
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum var. lanceolatum, also known as Rockrose or Swedish Heather, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of Helianthemum oelandicum var. lanceolatum have been found to benefit various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to stimulate collagen production and reduce inflammation. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve to be used topically or taken internally, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
